__README__: PLACEHOLDER ONLY. Download the real google-services.json from Firebase Console (Project settings -> Your apps -> Android app, package name com.kixxme.app) and save it as android/app/google-services.json (drop the .example). The Gradle google-services plugin auto-applies only when google-services.json is present; without it the Android build still succeeds but push is disabled. Do NOT rename or commit secrets in this example file.
